body_html_quoted.html:
Experience 30+ menu items at our exclusive catering tasting - completely free when you book 🍽️

Imagine walking into your event and watching your guests' faces light up with their first bite.

That moment of pure delight when they taste authentic Brazilian flavors they've never experienced before.

You can have that confidence – and we'll show you exactly how.

Introducing our exclusive catering tastings, where you become the VIP guest at your own private culinary showcase.

This isn't just about trying food – it's about experiencing the exact same quality and presentation your guests will receive.

What You'll Experience

Sample over 30 of our most popular catering menu items in one unforgettable session.

From our signature Rodizio experience to perfectly seasoned grilled vegetables, every dish tells the story of authentic Brazilian hospitality.

Discover why our clients say "the food was the highlight of our entire event."

Meet face-to-face with one of our experienced catering managers who've orchestrated hundreds of flawless celebrations.

Ask every question that's been on your mind – from dietary accommodations to service logistics.

Get insider tips that only come from years of catering expertise.

Learn the secrets behind creating an event that guests talk about for months afterward.

Leave With Complete Confidence

Walk away with a personalized quote tailored specifically to your vision and budget.

No pressure, no rushing – just honest answers and transparent pricing.

Here's the best part: your tasting investment is completely refunded when you book your event with us.

That means you're essentially getting this exclusive, personalized experience for free.

But the real value isn't in the savings – it's in the peace of mind knowing exactly what your guests will experience.

Most people plan their biggest celebrations based on hope and reviews from strangers.

You'll plan yours based on your own personal experience and complete confidence.

Connect with your Catering Consultant to see when the next tasting slot is available. Space for these is extremely limited to ensure every client receives our full attention.

Comeketo Catering

199 Main Street
Fitchburg, MA

This is an unmonitored inbox, for help, questions, or more details, please contact your catering consultant

Unsubscribe





-----
Regards,
Andre Raw
​​Catering Event Coordinator
📲 C: (978) 235-3791
📲 W: (978) 381-1212
Facebook | Instagram | Website
